chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6485 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 27464/2022 2. For hearing of main case 21.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Vawda advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner would be satisfied if the respondent department would adjudicate the impugned notice vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no adverse proceedings pursuant to the impugned notice would be initiated. Learned AAG is present and articulates no cavil in such regard and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
